Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-06 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum ranking shows two exceptional performers at the top, with FSLY commanding rank #1 at a score of 97.8 and TNGX close behind. FSLY demonstrates remarkably consistent momentum across all timeframes—1-month returns of 151%, 6-month returns of 186%, and 1-year returns of 199%—while maintaining all four SMA gates (above the 30/50/100/200 day averages) and scoring nearly perfect on resilience during SPY downdays at 99.9. TNGX presents a more extreme but slightly more volatile profile, with a stunning 706% 1-year return and 1-week outperformance of 53% versus SPY, though its ratio consistency shows a notable weakness (0.72 for the 1-month-to-1-week ratio) indicating some choppiness in the acceleration pattern. Both tickers pass all technical gates and exhibit strong correlation patterns that suggest their moves are driven by genuine momentum rather than broad market beta. The data reveals these are statistical outliers in short-term strength, though investors should note FSLY's more balanced ratio progression versus TNGX's more erratic intermediate-term behavior.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
